# Roadie Labs Race Database

> The definitive road race database. 425 races rated on 14 base dimensions plus cultural impact, scored 0-100, and tiered 1-4.
> Last generated: 2026-07-23

## Overview

Roadie Labs is an independent road cycling event database covering 425 races across North America and beyond. Every race is scored on 14 dimensions (distance, climbing, descent technicality, road surface, climate risk, altitude, logistics, prestige, organization, scenic experience, community culture, field depth, value, expenses) on a 1-5 scale, plus a cultural-impact bonus (the 15th criterion), producing an overall score out of 100 and a tier assignment (T1=elite, T2=strong, T3=solid, T4=developing).

- **Tier 1 (Elite)**: 22 races — score >= 80 or prestige override
- **Tier 2 (Strong)**: 329 races — score >= 60
- **Tier 3 (Solid)**: 73 races — score >= 45
- **Tier 4 (Developing)**: 1 races — score < 45

Disciplines: gran fondo, sportive, century, multi-stage, hillclimb.
Regions: Africa, Asia, Eastern Europe, North America, Northern Europe, Oceania, Other, South America, Southern Europe, UK & Ireland, Western Europe.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Full LLM context (this database as text)](https://roadielabs.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Race index JSON (425 entries)](https://roadielabs.com/search/race-index.json)
- [RSS feed](https://roadielabs.com/feed/races.xml)
- [Source code & data (GitHub)](https://github.com/wattgod/road-race-automation)
- [Individual race profiles](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/)
- [Markdown profiles](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}.md)
- [Race training-plan guides](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/training-plan/)
- [Race prep kits](https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}/prep-kit/)

## Markdown Mirrors

Every race profile is also published as clean Markdown with YAML
frontmatter, one file per race, at:

`https://roadielabs.com/race/{slug}.md`

e.g. https://roadielabs.com/race/unbound-200.md

## Contact

- Website: https://roadielabs.com
- Email: matt@roadielabs.com
